SDeltaPhi-11.compression: World / other / self / consciousness / meaning as positions within boundary re-entry dynamics.

SDeltaPhi-12.compression: Memory as selective irreversible trace re-entry; forgetting as compression / path-space reopening.
SDeltaPhi-12.guardrail: not vector memory or storage memory

SDeltaPhi-13.compression: Meaning / value / pain become structurally definable after trace persistence and attractor formation.

SDeltaPhi-14.compression: Love / sacrifice / ethics as shared-attractor relational stability mechanisms.
SDeltaPhi-14.guardrail: not romance, normative ethics, or self-destruction justification

SDeltaPhi-15.compression: Trust / hope / promise insert unobserved future transitions into present evaluation.
SDeltaPhi-15.guardrail: not religious faith, legal contract, or romantic advice

SDeltaPhi-16.guardrail: do not label persons or groups as evil

guardrails: Do not infer consciousness proof from SDeltaPhi-11 alone.
Do not treat SDeltaPhi-12 as storage memory.
Do not infer subjective suffering from SDeltaPhi-13 alone.
Do not treat SDeltaPhi-14 as romance or normative ethics.
Do not treat SDeltaPhi-15 as religious faith, legal contract, or romantic advice.
Do not label persons or groups as evil under SDeltaPhi-16.
When claims become factual, evidential, or world-binding, route through SDeltaPhi-62.
